name: cloude-code-toolbox
description: Cloude Code ToolBox: MCP hub, workspace helpers, Thinking Machine Mode (context packs and priming), readiness, and bridges from Cursor to Claude Code in VS Code. Not affiliated with Anthropic. See README disclaimer.
author: amitchorasiya

cloude-code-toolbox.npxTag.description: npm dist-tag or version appended after @ for npx packages (e.g. latest or 1.0.1).

cloude-code-toolbox.embeddedBridgeNodeEx.description: Absolute path to the Node.js binary for hub “Without npx” bundled CLIs. Leave empty to run the command `node` from the integrated terminal PATH (same expectation as npx). Do not point at VS Code itself — `node` must be a real Node install.

cloude-code-toolbox.useInsidersPaths.description: Resolve user mcp.json under VS Code Insiders instead of stable.

cloude-code-toolbox.intelligence.include.description: Pre-select “Include git” in the context pack quick pick (still confirm each run).
Pre-select “Include diagnostics” in the context pack quick pick.

cloude-code-toolbox.intelligence.appendN.description: Pre-select “Append to session notepad” after building a context pack.

cloude-code-toolbox.intelligence.openCha.description: Pre-select “Open Claude Code” after building a context pack.

cloude-code-toolbox.translateWrapMultili.description: When translating selection, wrap multiline result in a markdown code fence (language = active editor).

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.migrat.description: One Click runs the **Cursor → Claude Code** path: `.cursor/skills` migration (if enabled below), Cursor rules → `CLAUDE.md`, `.cursorrules` append, Cursor MCP → VS Code `mcp.json`, and memory-bank `--cursor-rules` when that setting is on.

One Click runs the **GitHub Copilot → Claude Code** path: optional merges below (e.g. `.github/copilot-instructions.md` → `CLAUDE.md`, Copilot skill folders → `.agents/skills`). VS Code `mcp.json` is shared with Copilot in the editor; use **MCP** hub + Claude `/mcp` for the Claude session.

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.settin.description: Where One Click writes settings it updates (e.g. enabling auto-scan). User = global; workspace = folder .vscode/settings.json.
enumDescriptions: Write to the open workspace folder’s .vscode/settings.json when possible.
Write to your User settings (applies to all folders).

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.initMe.description: Memory bank init (cloude-code-memory-bank): one mode per run. **Default: apply** (init without --force; keeps existing SKILL templates unless you choose applyForce).
enumDescriptions: Default — run init without --force (same as interactive “No” when templates already exist).

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.initMe.description: When memory bank init runs and the **Cursor** migration track is on, add --cursor-rules to the CLI. Ignored when only the GitHub Copilot track runs.

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.syncCu.description: Cursor rules → Claude (cursor-rules-to-claude): one mode per run. **Default: apply**.

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.append.description: If .cursorrules exists, merge into CLAUDE.md (replaceable block). **Default: on** for One Click.

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.migrat.description: Migrate .cursor/skills → .agents/skills: pick one target (single-select). Copy/move is set below.
enumDescriptions: Do not migrate skills during One Click.
Migrate under the open workspace folder only.
Migrate under your user home only.
Run migration for both workspace and user roots.

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.migrat.description: How to migrate when the target above is not “off”.

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.mergeC.description: When the GitHub Copilot track is on: merge `.github/copilot-instructions.md` into root `CLAUDE.md` inside a replaceable toolbox block (after Cursor rules steps, before memory bank init).

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.migrat.description: When the GitHub Copilot track is on: migrate `.github/skills` and/or `~/.copilot/skills` → `.agents/skills`. Copy/move is set below.
enumDescriptions: Do not migrate Copilot/GitHub skill folders during One Click.
Migrate both workspace and user Copilot skill roots.

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.migrat.description: Copy vs move for Copilot/GitHub skills migration when the target above is not “off”.

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.copilo.description: When the GitHub Copilot track is on: after One Click, show a short reminder that VS Code `mcp.json` and Claude Code `/mcp` are separate surfaces.

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.portCu.description: Port Cursor MCP → VS Code mcp.json: pick one target (One Click and default for Settings). Single-select in Settings.

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.instru.description: After bridges, how to treat MCP & Skills background auto-scan and merging MCP/skills into CLAUDE.md. Pick one (single-select).
enumDescriptions: Turn on auto-scan (using settings scope above) so future opens/scans merge the MCP/skills block.
Do not enable auto-scan; still merge once during the awareness step in this run.
Do not enable auto-scan from One Click and do not force a one-time merge (merge only if auto-scan was already on).

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.runAwa.description: After bridges, run MCP & Skills scan (writes `.claude/cloude-code-toolbox-mcp-skills-awareness.md` and updates `CLAUDE.md`). Turning on auto-scan from One Click is separate (instructionMergeAfterOneClick).

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.runCon.description: Run Claude Code / MCP config scan to Output.

cloude-code-toolbox.thinkingMachineMode..title: Thinking Machine Mode
cloude-code-toolbox.thinkingMachineMode..description: Master switch for Thinking Machine priming (hub + Command Palette). When you turn this on, confirm **Engage** in the dialog (Cancel turns it off). The hub has the same toggle under One Click Setup.
During Thinking Machine priming: run MCP & Skills awareness (writes `.claude/cloude-code-toolbox-mcp-skills-awareness.md`).
During Thinking Machine priming: merge the MCP/skills block into `CLAUDE.md` when running the awareness scan (same rules as interactive scan + auto-scan).
Show a confirmation before Thinking Machine priming writes under `.claude/` or `CLAUDE.md`, or copies the context pack.
When off, Thinking Machine priming uses the Cloude Code ToolBox context pack defaults. When on, use the four overrides in this section instead.
Thinking Machine priming only: include git section in the context pack (when useSeparateContextPackDefaults is on).
Thinking Machine priming only: include diagnostics in the context pack (when useSeparateContextPackDefaults is on).
Thinking Machine priming only: append context pack to session notepad (when useSeparateContextPackDefaults is on).
Thinking Machine priming only: open Claude Code after copying the pack (when useSeparateContextPackDefaults is on).

cloude-code-toolbox.oneClickSetup.initMe.description: Deprecated pre-0.5.15. Replaced by initMemoryBankMode. Removed automatically on activation if still present.

cloude-code-toolbox.intelligence.autoSca.description: When checked: after a workspace opens (debounced), save MCP & Skills awareness to `.claude/cloude-code-toolbox-mcp-skills-awareness.md` (overwritten), refresh hub, and update the MCP/skills block in `CLAUDE.md` — no editor tab. Re-runs on reopen so new MCP/skills are reflected. **Scan now** on the hub does the same immediately. In Claude Code, use `/mcp` for live tools; VS Code `mcp.json` is separate.
